Maximum Number of Files to Track.name: Maximum Number of Files to Track
Maximum Number of Files to Track.displayName: Maximum Number of Files to Track

properties.Valid_Enriched_Data:
SELECT 
  id, 
  user_id, 
  CAST(amount AS DOUBLE) AS amount, 
  CASE WHEN status = '???' THEN 'Unknown' ELSE status END AS status, 
  category, 
  "timestamp", 
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS nifi_process_time 
FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE id IS NOT NULL AND CAST(amount AS VARCHAR) <> 'INVALID_AMOUNT'
properties.Invalid_Data_DLQ: SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE WHERE id IS NULL OR CAST(amount AS VARCHAR) = 'INVALID_AMOUNT'
